acceptedAnswer.text: Houston-specific signals include NAP consistency, local schema, Texas bar citations, and content on city ordinances for Perplexity local legal queries.

suggestedAnswer.text: Embed Houston zip codes, reference Harris County courts, and link to texaslawhelp.org. Perplexity weighs geo-relevance heavily; claim Google Business Profile fully. Avoid generic content.
